body.title: Port aider graph-ranked token-budgeted orientation packet (P1)
body.description:
**Problem:** our loop read-wandered (F-A: 47-102 Reads, 0 edits) because orientation is a MODEL behavior driven by tool calls. aider makes orientation a DATA STRUCTURE: a graph-ranked, token-budgeted repo map delivered as context with zero tool calls — the single capability that carried aider's 4/4 multi-file checkout with nothing pre-added. Our `build_signature_map` is keyword-Jaccard over a code_index with NO edge data (its own docstring flags graph-rank as a follow-up).

**Proposed shape:** replace/augment `build_signature_map` (orientation_classifier.py:284) with a graph-ranked packet ported from aider `repomap.py`: def/ref edges (Python import/ref graph or tree-sitter tags) -> PageRank personalized by ticket-mentioned files/idents (`get_ranked_tags`) -> token-budget binary search (`get_ranked_tags_map_uncached`) -> content/mtime-keyed cache. Deliver the packet as orientation context to the architect.

**Affected files:** unseen_university/devices/scraps/orientation_classifier.py (build_signature_map); new repomap-style module; cache in Postgres or flat-file. MEDIUM inertia.
**Design rules:** ⛔ NO SQLITE — aider's diskcache IS SQLite and must NOT be ported as-is; re-home the cache to Postgres/flat-file. PageRank is a RANK, never an identity key. Packet is the deterministic input to the nexus packet-fingerprint — keep its keying exact/structural.
**Scope boundary:** the graph-ranked budgeted orientation packet + its cache. NOT wiring it as a nexus row yet (that is T-nexus-write-path-ds-architect-loop's packet-fingerprint input).
**Test plan:** red->green — given a repo + a ticket seeding idents, the packet ranks the truly-relevant files above noise WITHIN a token budget (assert the known-relevant files appear, noise files do not, total <= budget); the multi-file orientation task resolves with the packet as sole orientation, no files pre-added.
**Completion criteria:** graph-ranked token-budgeted packet replaces keyword-Jaccard; ranking + budget tests pass; the multi-file orientation task passes with the packet alone; cache is Postgres/flat-file (no sqlite import — audit_check_sqlite_imports clean).

## Pre-computed constraints (auto-stamped at add time)
[hard_block] ⛔ NO SQLITE. EVER. POSTGRES OR FLAT-FILE ONLY. See banner at top of this file. — applies: all (source: CLAUDE.md#hard-rules)
[hard_block] Log every state change and every interface crossing. State changes: ticket status — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
[error] No TheIgors imports. UnseenUniversity must be portable without TheIgors present. — applies: all (source: CLAUDE.md#hard-rules)
[error] No live keys or passwords in source. `.env` is gitignored. — applies: all (source: CLAUDE.md#hard-rules)
[error] `pip install -e .` must succeed at all times (even with empty stubs). — applies: all (source: CLAUDE.md#hard-rules)
[error] Canonical dev-process memory — one home, no exceptions. Every dev-process artifact — — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
[error] device.py and shim.py are the design center. Every component inherits from — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
[error] bus/ owns comms:// routing. Nothing outside bus/ speaks to IMAP directly. — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
[error] skeleton/ owns the MCP aggregator and flat-file registry. No Postgres dependency. — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
[error] devices/ contains one subdirectory per device; each is independently deployable. — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
[error] `~/.unseen_university/logs/<device>/<stream>/` is the canonical log hierarchy — — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
[error] Every ticket closes proven, or declares itself unproven — no discriminator. A ticket that — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
…and 39 more (lower-severity or capped) — query constraints_get for the full set

## BUILD ORIENTATION (CC.0, 2026-07-07 — pre-build checkpoint; oriented + advisor-reviewed, NOT yet built)
Checkpointed for a FRESH session: the numeric core (personalized PageRank) is silent-failure territory and this L was scoped deep in a session that already shipped P2+P3 — handing off with the expensive orientation captured so a fresh context builds it right (deep-context confabulation risk on hand-rolled numerics).

**Substrate swaps (forced by absent deps; both within this ticket's stated allowances):**
- networkx ABSENT (and `nx.pagerank` pulls scipy, also absent) → DO NOT add networkx. Implement a pure-Python power-iteration personalized PageRank (with dangling redistribution). ~30-40 lines, deterministic.
- tree-sitter ABSENT → use stdlib `ast` for the Python def/ref tags (ticket allows "Python import/ref graph OR tree-sitter tags"). Python-only scope is fine.
- aider's TAGS_CACHE is SQLite → re-home to a flat-file JSON cache keyed by content-hash+mtime (⛔ NO SQLITE).

**Port target (aider /home/akien/dev/src/aider/aider/repomap.py):**
- `get_ranked_tags` (line 365) — the ranking. Port the weighting FAITHFULLY: mentioned_idents ×10; long snake/kebab/camel (len>=8) ×10; private `_`-prefix ×0.1; over-defined (>5 definers) ×0.1; referencer-in-chat ×50; `num_refs = sqrt(num_refs)`; self-edge weight 0.1 for def-without-ref. Personalization = 100/len(fnames) for ticket-mentioned files + files whose path components match mentioned idents; pass it as BOTH `personalization` and `dangling` in the PR.
- `get_ranked_tags_map_uncached` (line 629, READ THIS BEFORE BUILDING) — the token/char-budget BINARY SEARCH over ranked tags (`middle = min(max_tokens//25, num_tags)`, bisect on fit).
- Rank distribution across out-edges → `ranked_definitions[(dst, ident)] += src_rank * weight/total_weight`.

**LOAD-BEARING correctness (advisor):**
1. The `def ∩ ref` intersection (repomap.py:468) is THE noise filter and is MORE critical with ast than tree-sitter: ast Name-loads include every local/`self`/builtin. Only idents both DEFINED and REFERENCED in-repo form edges. Port faithfully or ranking drowns in noise.
2. `code_index` (queried at orientation_classifier.py:284, query_file_symbols) ALREADY gives the `defines` half (path,symbol,kind rows). Reuse it — only `ast`-parse files for the REFS half; don't stand up a fully independent re-parse.

**THE DISCRIMINATING PROOF (this is what makes red→green authentic — the red baseline IS keyword-Jaccard `build_signature_map`):**
- End-to-end fixture: a target file with ZERO keyword overlap with the ticket but HEAVILY REFERENCED by a ticket-mentioned file. keyword-Jaccard MISSES it; graph-rank CATCHES it. Assert it appears in the packet (graph) — the keyword version fails this exact assertion. Drive through the STABLE `build_signature_map` name (exists in both versions) and assert on returned packet text → revert stays importable (same revert-safety pattern as the block editor proof).
- Separate small-graph PageRank UNIT test: make personalization load-bearing — a low-degree file that ranks up ONLY because the ticket mentions it (a PR that ignores personalization still passes a loose e2e fixture, so pin numerics directly).
- Plus budget test: total packet <= budget; known-relevant appear, noise excluded.

**Affected:** unseen_university/devices/scraps/orientation_classifier.py:284 (build_signature_map — augment/replace); new repomap-style module (scraps device); flat-file cache. MEDIUM inertia. Completion: audit_check_sqlite_imports clean.
body.result: Graph-ranked token-budgeted orientation packet (P1): new repo_graph_map.py ports aider repomap get_ranked_tags + budget binary-search onto stdlib-ast def/ref graph + pure personalized power-iteration PageRank (networkx/tree-sitter/scipy absent) + flat-file TagCache (NO SQLITE). def-intersect-ref noise filter; rank never identity. Wired as PRIMARY orientation in build_signature_map (fail-open->keyword). Proven red->green: graph-rank surfaces a zero-keyword-overlap file that a mentioned file heavily references, ranked above noise — keyword-Jaccard drops it. Cache persistence-path wiring into production deferred (needs Akien-approved ~/.unseen_university cache location); graph map runs cache=None meanwhile.
